title: agrostis capillaris var. hispida
intro: Agrostis capillaris var. hispida, commonly known as hairy bent or hairy bent grass, is a type of grass native to the British Isles. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including soothing digestive issues and reducing inflammation. Herbal preparations of Agrostis capillaris var. hispida can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to aid in the treatment of gastrointestinal issues and skin conditions.
